get_hn_top_stories.name: get_hn_top_stories
get_hn_top_stories.description: Fetch top stories from Hacker News front page (no auth)
get_hn_top_stories.instructions: Navigate to https://news.ycombinator.com/. Extract the top 10 stories from the front page. For each story, collect title, url, points, author, comments_count, and rank. Return only valid JSON.

get_github_trending.name: get_github_trending
get_github_trending.instructions: Navigate to https://github.com/trending. Extract the first 10 repositories shown. For each repository, collect name (owner/repo), description, language, stars, and stars_today. Return only valid JSON.

extract_top_stories.name: extract_top_stories
extract_top_stories.description: Extract the list of top stories including each story's title, score, comment count, and submitter name from the homepage.
extract_top_stories.instructions: 1. Navigate to https://news.ycombinator.com. 2. Extract the list of top stories including each story's title, score, comment count, and submitter name from the homepage.

sample_data.title: We do not think Anthropic should be designated as a supply chain risk
The Windows 95 user interface: A case study in usability engineering (1996)
Obsidian Sync now has a headless client

extract_top_news_and_comments.name: extract_top_news_and_comments
extract_top_news_and_comments.description: Extract the list of top news stories along with their titles, URLs, and comment counts from the homepage.
extract_top_news_and_comments.instructions: 1. Navigate to URL. 2. Locate the list of top news stories. 3. Extract title, score (points), URL, and comment count for each story.

output_schema.title: string
output_schema.comments: integer or null if not available.

extract_top_news_and_comments.sample_data: [{"title": "Microgpt", "score": 468, "url": "http://karpathy.github.io/2026/02/12/microgpt/", "comments": 85}, {"title": "We do not think Anthropic should be designated as a supply chain risk", "score": 438, "url": "https://twitter.com/OpenAI/status/2027846016423321831", "comments": 191}, {"title": "The Windows 95 user interface: A case study in usability engineering (1996)", "score": 213, "url": "https://dl.acm.org/doi/fullHtml/10.1145/238386.238611", "comments": 127}, {"title": "SQL vs. NoSQL: How to Answer This Interview Question in 2026", "score": 13, "url": "https://www.thetrueengineer.com/p/sql-vs-nosql-how-to-answer-this-interview", "comments": null}, {"title": "Obsidian Sync now has a headless client", "score": 441, "url": "https://help.obsidian.md/sync/headless", "comments": 152}, {"title": "The happiest I've ever been...
